## Summary

Describe the change in 2 to 5 lines.

## Change Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] ui
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Branch Details

- Base branch: `develop` or `main` for approved hotfixes only
- Source branch: `feature/*`, `bugfix/*`, or `hotfix/*`

## Verification

- [ ] I pulled the latest target branch before starting work
- [ ] I kept commits small and meaningful
- [ ] I ran relevant local checks
- [ ] GitHub Actions CI passes
- [ ] No `.env` or secrets are included

## Testing Notes

List what you tested.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for frontend or UI changes.

## Deployment Notes

Mention anything reviewers or release owners should know before merge.
